languages.text: {n}Глаза Ларии едва заметно расширяются, однако голос остается безупречно ровным.{/n} "Отец, эти люди — часть моей агентурной сети. Данная кодовая фраза не могла оказаться в распоряжении слуг Инквизиции".
languages.translation_comment:
Лария
Стартуют DL_LariaHasQuestion, DL_LariaAgentMask и Obj1_Add_LariaPassHelp

traits.locale_text: {n}Глаза Ларии едва заметно расширяются, однако голос остается безупречно ровным.{/n} "Отец, эти люди — часть моей агентурной сети. Данная кодовая фраза не могла оказаться в распоряжении слуг Инквизиции".

languages.text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."
languages.original_text: {n}Глаза Ларии едва заметно расширяются, однако голос остается безупречно ровным.{/n} "Отец, эти люди — часть моей агентурной сети. Данная кодовая фраза не могла оказаться в распоряжении слуг Инквизиции".

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen very slightly, but her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

{n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."
{n}Laria's eyes widen, but that is the only sign of her surprise.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. Yes, the code phrase is an old one, and Ordos servants cannot know it."

{n}Laria's eyes widen very slightly, but her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

{n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

{n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅的眼睛微微睁大，但声音依然平静如水：{/n}“父亲，这些人隶属于我的情报网络。审判庭的仆从不可能知道这句暗语。”
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅的眼睛微微睁大，但声音依然平静如水：{/n}“父亲，这些人隶属于我的情报网络。审判庭的仆从不可能知道这句暗语。”

languages.text: {n}Laria écarquille légèrement les yeux, mais sa voix reste inchangée.{/n} « Père, ces gens font partie de mon réseau d'agents. Les serviteurs de l'Inquisition n'auraient jamais pu obtenir la phrase codée. »
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria écarquille légèrement les yeux, mais sa voix reste inchangée.{/n} « Père, ces gens font partie de mon réseau d'agents. Les serviteurs de l'Inquisition n'auraient jamais pu obtenir la phrase codée. »

languages.text: {n}Laria'nın gözleri hafifçe açılsa da sesi kusursuz derecede düzgün çıkıyor.{/n} "Baba, bu insanlar benim ajan ağımın bir parçası. Engizisyon hizmetkârları şifreyi ele geçirmiş olamaz."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria'nın gözleri hafifçe açılsa da sesi kusursuz derecede düzgün çıkıyor.{/n} "Baba, bu insanlar benim ajan ağımın bir parçası. Engizisyon hizmetkârları şifreyi ele geçirmiş olamaz."

languages.text: {n}Laria abre los ojos levemente, pero su voz permanece perfectamente neutral.{/n} «Padre, esta gente es parte de mi red. Los sirvientes de la Inquisición no podrían haber conseguido el código».
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria abre los ojos levemente, pero su voz permanece perfectamente neutral.{/n} «Padre, esta gente es parte de mi red. Los sirvientes de la Inquisición no podrían haber conseguido el código».

languages.text: {n}Larias Augen weiten sich ein wenig, aber ihre Stimme bleibt völlig ruhig.{/n} "Vater, diese Leute gehören zu meinem Netzwerk von Agenten. Die Diener des Inquisition durften das Codewort nicht erlangen."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."

traits.locale_text: {n}Larias Augen weiten sich ein wenig, aber ihre Stimme bleibt völlig ruhig.{/n} "Vater, diese Leute gehören zu meinem Netzwerk von Agenten. Die Diener des Inquisition durften das Codewort nicht erlangen."

languages.text: {n}ラリアの目はわずかに広がったが、声は平然としていた。{/n}「父、この人たちはおれのアジトの仲間だ。宗教裁判所の使いが暗号語を手に入れたとは考えにくい」
languages.original_text: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."
